title: Timer
bodyHtml:
One timer, two modes. Open the ⏱ Timer app and pick the mode that fits what you're doing using the tabs at the top.

Basic Mode

A simple countdown. Tap the time to set hours, minutes, and seconds, then hit Start. You'll hear a chime when it's done. Use Pause to stop the clock and Reset to start over.

Great for:

  • Timed assignments
  • Quick breaks
  • "I'll study for 30 more minutes" situations

Pomodoro Mode

The Pomodoro technique breaks your work into focused chunks:

  1. Focus session (25 minutes by default)
  2. Short break (5 minutes by default)
  3. Repeat
  4. After a few focus sessions, take a longer break (15 minutes by default)

The timer cycles through these phases automatically — just tap Start and you'll hear a chime at the end of each phase. Use Skip to jump to the next phase or Reset to start over.

The dots show how many focus sessions you've completed in the current cycle.

Customizing Pomodoro

Tap the ⚙ gear icon in Pomodoro mode to adjust:

  • Focus duration
  • Short break duration
  • Long break duration
  • How many focus sessions before the long break

Switching modes

Tap the Basic or Pomodoro tab at the top. You can switch anytime the timer isn't running.

Why Pomodoro works

Your brain stays fresher when you take regular breaks. It's not about studying longer — it's about studying smarter.
description: How to use Basic and Pomodoro timer modes for focused study sessions.
